The [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] '''''Law''-class light patrol craft''' was intended as a scout craft but more often saw use as a systems patrol and customs ship.<ref name="PP" />

==Characteristics==
51 meters long, it carried 15 crew (including 5 gunners), up to 10 prisoners, 250 metric tons of cargo, and 3 months' worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]].<ref name="PP" />

Capable of 850 kilometers per hour in atmosphere, the ship had a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and a Class 12 backup.<ref name="PP" />

The ship boasted 4 laser cannons (2 forward and 2 turreted) and 1 forward [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher which held 5 torpedoes. It was modestly shielded.<ref name="TFOP" />

==History==
The ''Law''-class patrol craft was released years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and was used in many sectors.<ref name="PP" />

The ''Law''-class was the primary vessel of [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Rangers]].<ref name="TFOP" />
